  • 以酒致祸 - Phrase meaning causing disaster through alcohol.
  • 大张乐邀不至 - Phrase meaning a grand celebration where someone was not invited.
  • 连诛数十人 - Phrase meaning the execution of dozens of people.
  • 自缢而死 - Phrase meaning committing suicide by hanging.
  • 腰斩从晦 - Phrase meaning executing someone by decapitation.
  • 葆光子曰 - Phrase meaning 'Preserving Light says,' introducing a commentary or reflection.
  • 性好狎邪 - Phrase meaning having a fondness for debauchery.
  • 元戎张筵托以寒召之不至 - Phrase meaning the military commander setting up a banquet and inviting someone under the pretext of cold weather, but they did not come.
  • 乃与营妓曲宴 - Phrase meaning having a private banquet with a camp prostitute.
  • 璋闻说甚怒索马诣馆遽欲害之 - Phrase meaning hearing about something and becoming very angry, immediately wanting to harm someone.
  • 仁矩鞹足端简门迎 - Phrase meaning appearing at the door with feet bound and dressed formally.

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 梁祖 - Refers to Liang Zong, a historical figure who was a warlord and later became the founder of the Later Liang dynasty.
  • 江彦温 - A historical figure who was the governor of Shouzhou.
  • 张从晦 - A historical figure who was a trusted official of Liang Zong.
  • 何藏耀 - A historical figure who was a drunkard and companion of Zhang Conghui.
  • 汴王 - Refers to Liang Zong, who was also known as the King of Bian.
  • 后唐明宗皇帝 - Refers to Emperor Mingzong of Later Tang, a historical figure who ruled during the Five Dynasties period.
  • 董璋 - A historical figure who was a warlord and governor of Dongchuan.
  • 李仁矩 - A historical figure who was a guest provincial envoy and later became involved in political intrigue.
  • 安重诲 - A historical figure who was a high-ranking official and advisor to Emperor Mingzong.

Proper Nouns

  • 北夢瑣言 - Title meaning 'Trivial Notes from the North Dream,' referring to a collection of anecdotes and stories.
  • 子部, 小說家類, 杂事之属 - Classification in the *Siku Quanshu* (Complete Library in Four Branches of Literature), indicating the genre and category of the work.
  • 钦定四库全书 - Title meaning 'Authorized Complete Library in Four Branches of Literature,' indicating the official compilation and publication of the work.
  • 唐 孙光宪 撰 - Indicates that the work was written by Sun Guangxian during the Tang Dynasty.
  • 梁祖图霸之初 - Refers to the early period when Liang Zong was planning his rise to power.
  • 遣亲吏张从晦劳其勤 - Means sending a trusted official, Zhang Conghui, to reward Jiang Yantong for his efforts.
  • 从晦无赖 - Describes Zhang Conghui as a good-for-nothing or unreliable person.
  • 酒酣有饮徒何藏耀者与之偕甚昵 - Describes a situation where, after drinking, a drunkard named He Cangyao accompanied Zhang Conghui very closely.
  • 每事悮禀从晦致命于郡 - Means that every matter was reported incorrectly to Zhang Conghui, who then gave orders to the city.
  • 果疑恐曰汴王谋我矣 - Jiang Yantong became suspicious and fearful, thinking that the King of Bian (Liang Zong) was plotting against him.
  • 连诛数十人 - Describes the execution of dozens of people.
  • 以状白其事 - Means reporting the matter to Liang Zong.
  • 既而又疑惧曰诉其腹心亡我族矣 - Jiang Yantong became even more suspicious and fearful, thinking that his close confidants were plotting against him.
  • 自缢而死 - Describes Jiang Yantong committing suicide by hanging.
  • 梁祖大怒按其事腰斩从晦 - Liang Zong became very angry and ordered Zhang Conghui to be executed by decapitation.
  • 葆光子曰 - Phrase meaning 'Preserving Light says,' introducing a commentary or reflection.
  • 后唐明宗皇帝时 - Refers to the reign of Emperor Mingzong of Later Tang.
  • 董璋据东川将有跋扈之心 - Describes Dong Zhang occupying Dongchuan and having rebellious intentions.
  • 遣客省使李仁矩出使梓潼 - Means sending a guest provincial envoy, Li Renju, to visit Zitong.
  • 性好狎邪 - Describes Li Renju as having a fondness for debauchery.
  • 元戎张筵托以寒召之不至 - Describes the military commander setting up a banquet and inviting Li Renju under the pretext of cold weather, but Li Renju did not come.
  • 乃与营妓曲宴 - Describes Li Renju having a private banquet with a camp prostitute.
  • 璋闻说甚怒索马诣馆遽欲害之 - Dong Zhang heard about this and became very angry, immediately wanting to harm Li Renju.
  • 仁矩鞹足端简门迎 - Describes Li Renju appearing at the door with his feet bound and dressed formally.

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 蜀使洪饮 - The envoy from Shu who drank heavily; possibly a euphemism for a drinking contest or excessive drinking.
  • 梁太祖初兼四镇 - Initially controlled four commanderies or regions; '太祖' is the temple name of the founder of the Later Liang dynasty, Zhu Wen.
  • 押衙潘岏持聘 - A military officer carrying a letter of credence or on a mission.
  • 攀防饮礼容益庄 - Adhering to etiquette while drinking, even more solemn in appearance; maintained composure despite drinking.
  • 簇在席器皿次第注酌 - Arranging the drinking vessels in order on the table and pouring and drinking; ritualistic arrangement of drinking vessels.
  • 温克 - To maintain composure or to be restrained.
  • 侦之 - To spy on or to observe.
  • 簪笋箨冠子 - A hat made from bamboo shoots; '簪' means to wear, '笋箨' means bamboo shoots, and '冠子' means hat.
  • 涤而藏之 - Cleaning and storing the drinking vessels; '涤' means to clean, and '藏之' means to store it.
  • 贤主人可以过得 - The wise host can be passed through or can be overcome.
  • 悮令公军机 - To mislead the general's military plans or strategic decisions.
  • 使令之美者也 - The mission was excellent or the envoys were excellent.
  • 齐州刺史琼先降 - The governor of Qi Prefecture Qiong surrendered first.
  • 兄来请先奉此 - The elder brother came and asked to present this first.
  • 勾曵 - Pulling and dragging.
  • 发所匿刃 - Revealing the hidden weapon or blade.
  • 掷琼首于埤也 - Throwing Qiong's head at the wall.
  • 哀恸 - Deep sorrow or deep grief.
  • 署琼弟玭为齐州防御使 - Appointing Qiong's younger brother Pin as the governor of Qi Prefecture.
  • 恩礼殊厚 - Giving special favor and courtesy or giving especially thick favor and courtesy.
  • 弃城投扬州 - Abandoning the city and fleeing to Yangzhou.
